query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_com_valor FROM devices WHERE valor IS NOT NULL AND valor > 0;
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(valor), 0) as receita_total FROM devices WHERE dataCadastro >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user VQ33uv9UCCJC5i3.a43d655f061c --database LDyffp73FNnPjitdoAxnFa --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_com_valor FROM devices WHERE valor IS NOT NULL AND valor > 0;
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(valor), 0) as receita_total FROM devices WHERE dataCadastro >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01');
